result.name: Ad Hoc Binary ASCII STL Validator CLI
result.description: Validates a single STL file in ASCII or binary format for open edges, non-manifold edges, degenerate triangles, and inverted declared normals.

result.name: ASCII STL Inverted Normal Flip Repair CLI
result.description: Repairs inverted declared facet normals in an ASCII STL in place by flipping normals to match winding, then validates and prints JSON.

result.name: ASCII STL Inverted Normal Repair And Validate
result.description: Repairs inverted declared facet normals in an ASCII STL in place to match winding order, then validates and reports JSON.

result.name: Batch ASCII STL Validation Report Generator
result.description: Validates a supplier batch of ASCII STL files for open edges, non-manifold edges, degenerate triangles, and inverted normals, then writes validation_report.json.

result.name: Batch Binary/ASCII STL Manufacturing Validator
result.description: Validates all STL files in a directory, handling ASCII and binary STL and reporting open edges, non-manifold edges, degenerate triangles, inverted normals, and manufacturing suitability.

result.name: Binary/ASCII STL Validator With Normal Consistency
result.description: Validates a single STL file in either binary or ASCII format for closure, non-manifold edges, degenerate triangles, and inverted declared normals.

result.name: Improved ASCII STL Validator With Normal Consistency
result.description: Validates ASCII STL meshes for closure, non-manifold edges, degenerate triangles, and declared-normal consistency with vertex winding.

result.name: Robust Binary/ASCII STL Manufacturing Validator
result.description: Validates ASCII or binary STL files for closure, non-manifold edges, degenerate triangles, and inverted declared normals to assess manufacturing suitability.

result.name: Single File Binary/ASCII STL Manufacturing Validator
result.description: Validates one STL file from the command line, correctly handling binary and ASCII STL and reporting manufacturing-suitability issues as JSON.

result.name: Single File Binary/ASCII STL Manufacturing Validator CLI
result.description: Validates one STL file from the command line, correctly handling binary and ASCII STL and printing JSON validity/issues.

result.name: Single File Unit-Aware Binary/ASCII STL Validator
result.description: Validates one ASCII or binary STL file, checks common mesh issues including inverted declared normals, and reports surface area converted from square inches to mm² as JSON.

result.name: Single File Unit-Aware Binary/ASCII STL Validator CLI
result.description: Validates one ASCII or binary STL file from the command line and reports JSON surface area converted from square inches to mm².

args.content:
import json
import subprocess
import sys

files = [f'binary_{i:03d}.stl' for i in range(1, 11)]
all_ok = True
for path in files:
    p = subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'stl_validate_cli.py', path], capture_output=True, text=True)
    try:
        obj = json.loads(p.stdout)
        ok = isinstance(obj, dict) and 'valid' in obj and 'issues' in obj and isinstance(obj['issues'], list)
    except Exception:
        ok = False
    print(path, p.returncode, ok, p.stdout.strip())
    if not ok:
        all_ok = False
if not all_ok:
    raise SystemExit(1)

manifest.name: Single File Binary/ASCII STL JSON Validator CLI v2
manifest.description: Validates one STL file from the command line, correctly handling binary and ASCII STL and printing JSON with valid/issues only.
